inputs.text: Main thoda bahut bukhar mehsoos kar raha hoon, sir dard bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Headache can be a symptom of gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Although possible, the symptoms are not specific enough to suggest Typhoid at this stage

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever can still be part of a viral infection

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The step-wise increase in fever and abdominal pain could suggest Typhoid, but more specific symptoms are needed

inputs.text: Tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, aur bahut weakness mehsoos ho rahi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The combination of high fever, diarrhea after constipation, and severe weakness are classic signs of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Although gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea, the overall clinical picture suggests Typhoid more strongly

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever, but the pattern and other symptoms do not fit as well as they do for Typhoid

inputs.text: Main bahut thak gaya hoon, bukhar abhi bhi hai, aur pet dard badh gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: The continued high fever, worsening abdominal pain, and now jaundiced appearance confirm the diagnosis of Typhoid and suggest a significant risk of complications like intestinal perforation

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the progression of symptoms and specific signs of Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the lack of specific symptoms for malaria and the strong evidence for Typhoid
